name: vp
description: Vite+ - a unified frontend build tool (dev/build/test/lint/fmt + package management + task runner)

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create a new project from a template (builtin, remote, local, or org scope)

options.name: --directory
options.description: Target directory for the generated project

options.name: --agent
options.description: Write coding agent instructions to AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, etc.

options.name: --editor
options.description: Write editor config files for the specified editor

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.description: Migrate standalone Vite/Vitest/Oxlint/Oxfmt/Prettier projects to Vite+

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Configure Vite+ for the current project (hooks + agent integration)

subcommands.name: staged
subcommands.description: Run linters on staged files using staged config from vite.config.ts

options.name: --allow-empty
options.description: Allow empty commits when tasks revert all staged changes

name: -p
--concurrent
options.description: Number of tasks to run concurrently, or false for serial

options.name: --continue-on-error
options.description: Run all tasks to completion even if one fails

options.name: --cwd
options.description: Working directory to run all tasks in

options.name: --diff
options.description: Override the default --staged flag of git diff

options.name: --diff-filter
options.description: Override the default --diff-filter=ACMR flag of git diff

options.name: --fail-on-changes
options.description: Fail with exit code 1 when tasks modify tracked files

options.name: --hide-partially-staged
options.description: Hide unstaged changes from partially staged files

options.name: --hide-unstaged
options.description: Hide all unstaged changes before running tasks

name: -r
--relative
options.description: Pass filepaths relative to cwd to tasks

options.name: --revert
options.description: Revert to original state in case of errors

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Show task output even when tasks succeed

name: install
i
subcommands.description: Install all dependencies, or add packages if package names are provided

name: -D
--dev
options.description: Only install devDependencies (install) / Save to devDependencies (add)

options.name: --frozen-lockfile
options.description: Fail if lockfile needs to be updated (CI mode)

options.name: --offline
options.description: Only use packages already in cache

options.name: --fix-lockfile
options.description: Fix broken lockfile entries (pnpm and yarn@2+ only)

options.name: --resolution-only
options.description: Re-run resolution for peer dependency analysis (pnpm only)

options.name: --filter
options.description: Filter packages in monorepo (can be used multiple times)

name: -E
--save-exact
options.description: Save exact version (only when adding packages)

options.name: --save-peer
options.description: Save to peerDependencies (only when adding packages)

name: -O
--save-optional
options.description: Save to optionalDependencies (only when adding packages)

options.name: --save-catalog
options.description: Save to the default catalog (only when adding packages)

options.name: --node
options.description: Node.js version for global install (only with -g)

subcommands.name: setup
subcommands.description: Create or update shims in VP_HOME/bin

options.name: --env-only
options.description: Only print env snippet, do not install shims

subcommands.name: on
subcommands.description: Enable managed mode - shims always use vite-plus managed Node.js

subcommands.name: off
subcommands.description: Enable system-first mode - shims prefer system Node.js, fallback to managed

subcommands.name: print
subcommands.description: Print shell snippet to set environment for current session

subcommands.name: default
subcommands.description: Set or show the global default Node.js version

subcommands.name: pin
subcommands.description: Pin a Node.js version in the current directory (creates .node-version)

subcommands.name: use
subcommands.description: Use a specific Node.js version for this shell session

options.name: --silent-if-unchanged
options.description: Suppress output when version is unchanged

name: exec
run
subcommands.description: Execute a command with a specific Node.js version

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Run diagnostics and show environment status

subcommands.name: which
subcommands.description: Show path to the tool that would be executed

name: list-remote
ls-remote
subcommands.description: List available Node.js versions from the registry

subcommands.name: dev
subcommands.description: Run the development server (forwards options to Vite)

options.name: --strictPort
options.description: Exit if specified port is already in use

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Run format, lint, and type checks

options.name: --no-lint
options.description: Skip lint rules (type-check still runs if configured)

options.name: --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
options.description: Do not error when pattern is unmatched

options.name: --write
options.description: Format and write files in place

subcommands.name: related
subcommands.description: Run tests related to changed files

name: run
vpr
subcommands.description: Run tasks. Task specifier is `packageName#taskName` or `taskName`. If omitted, lists all available tasks.

name: -r
--recursive
options.description: Select all packages in the workspace

name: -t
--transitive
options.description: Select the current package and its transitive dependencies

name: -F
--filter
options.description: Match packages by name, directory, or glob pattern

options.name: --ignore-depends-on
options.description: Do not run dependencies specified in `dependsOn` fields

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Show full detailed summary after execution

options.name: --last-details
options.description: Display the detailed summary of the last run

args.name: exec
args.description: Execute a command from local node_modules/.bin

name: -r
--recursive
options.description: Select all packages in the workspace

name: -t
--transitive
options.description: Select the current package and its transitive dependencies

name: -F
--filter
options.description: Match packages by name, directory, or glob pattern

name: -c
--shell-mode
options.description: Execute the command within a shell environment

args.name: node
args.description: Run a Node.js script (shorthand for `env exec node`)

args.name: dlx
args.description: Execute a package binary without installing it as a dependency

args.name: cache
args.description: Manage the task cache

args.name: build
args.description: Build for production (forwards options to Vite)

args.name: pack
args.description: Build library (forwards options to tsdown)

name: -f
--format
options.description: Bundle format: esm, cjs, iife, umd

args.name: preview
args.description: Preview production build (forwards options to Vite)

options.name: --strictPort
options.description: Exit if specified port is already in use

args.name: add
args.description: Add packages to dependencies

name: -E
--save-exact
options.description: Save exact version rather than semver range

options.name: --save-catalog-name
options.description: Save the new dependency to the specified catalog name

options.name: --save-catalog
options.description: Save the new dependency to the default catalog

options.name: --allow-build
options.description: A list of package names allowed to run postinstall

options.name: --filter
options.description: Filter packages in monorepo (can be used multiple times)

options.name: --workspace
options.description: Only add if package exists in workspace (pnpm-specific)

options.name: --node
options.description: Node.js version to use for global installation (only with -g)

options.name: --concurrency
options.description: Number of global package installs to run in parallel (only with -g)

name: remove
rm
un
uninstall
args.description: Remove packages from dependencies

options.name: --filter
options.description: Filter packages in monorepo (can be used multiple times)

name: -r
--recursive
options.description: Remove recursively from all workspace packages

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Preview what would be removed without actually removing (only with -g)

name: update
up
args.description: Update packages to their latest versions

name: -L
--latest
options.description: Update to latest version (ignore semver range)

options.name: --concurrency
options.description: Number of global package updates to run in parallel (only with -g)

name: -r
--recursive
options.description: Update recursively in all workspace packages

options.name: --filter
options.description: Filter packages in monorepo (can be used multiple times)

options.name: --no-save
options.description: Update lockfile only, don't modify package.json

options.name: --workspace
options.description: Only update if package exists in workspace (pnpm-specific)

args.name: dedupe
args.description: Deduplicate dependencies by removing older versions

options.name: --check
options.description: Check if deduplication would make changes

args.name: outdated
args.description: Check for outdated packages

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: table (default), list, or json

name: list
ls
args.description: List installed packages (delegates to `vp pm list`)

options.name: --depth
options.description: Max display depth of dependency tree

options.name: --find-by
options.description: Use a finder function defined in .pnpmfile.cjs

name: why
explain
args.description: Show why a package is installed

options.name: --find-by
options.description: Use a finder function defined in .pnpmfile.cjs

name: info
view
show
args.description: View package information from the registry

name: link
ln
args.description: Link packages for local development

args.name: unlink
args.description: Unlink packages

args.name: rebuild
args.description: Rebuild native modules (delegates to `vp pm rebuild`)

args.name: pm
args.description: Forward a command to the package manager

subcommands.name: pack
subcommands.description: Create a tarball of the package

name: view
info
show
subcommands.description: View package information from the registry

subcommands.name: whoami
subcommands.description: Show the current logged in user

subcommands.name: search
subcommands.description: Search for packages in the registry

subcommands.name: fund
subcommands.description: Show funding information for installed packages

args.name: upgrade
args.description: Update vp itself to the latest version

options.name: --rollback
options.description: Revert to the previously active version

options.name: --force
options.description: Force reinstall even if already on the target version

args.name: implode
args.description: Remove vp and all related data
